title: CoreWeave KPI Data Injector

data_injector.name: data_injector
data_injector.description: Injects simulated business events for CoreWeave GPU Cloud KPI dashboard covering all 7 business KPIs: GPU infrastructure, AI/ML workloads, proactive operations, multi-cloud visibility, cost optimization, security posture, and autonomous operations.

description: Generates simulated business events every 30 minutes for CoreWeave's 7 key business KPIs. Events cover GPU node health, LLM inference metrics, anomaly detection, multi-cloud signals, cost optimization, security compliance, and intelligence agent actions.
